reviews.review_description:
You can see this game in my top 10 app lab list here: https://youtu.be/bwGl1PFWceA

Or just search 'VR Reviews' in YouTube.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for including the demo in your app lab list!  

KARTOFFL has just launched on the Quest Store, we're excited to see how you like the full game :)

reviews.review_description:
It took me forever to get the 3rd star on the last demo level! Great mindbender, obviously engineered thoroughly :-)

Looking forward to the full release!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words, SebaFlightOne. We're thrilled to announce that the full game of Kartoffl is now released on the Quest Store. Have fun :)

reviews.review_description:
I have really enjoyed this demo and am looking forward to the release. I have played it on both my Quest 1 and Quest 2. But I have noticed that now it no longer works on either platform. I open it, see the loading screen and then I am back at the dashboard. Anyone else getting this behavior?

Update: It now works. The devs fixed it in record time. Looking forward to the release.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your patience and demo feedback, rsloss. The full Kartoffl release is now out on the Quest Store - have fun, and let us know what you think :)

reviews.review_description: This is a fun puzzle game. The game really shines on the last level. The level got time management on where to put things and remove things at the right time and it was really fun and made me want to play more

developer_response.body:
...and now you can! The full game just launched on the Quest Store, have fun :)
Thank you for that great review - we hope you enjoy the full game as well.

reviews.review_title: PLEASE HURRY WITH THE FULL GAME
reviews.review_description: Great puzzler, well put together, fresh and cannot wait for the full release! Wish the demo had more levels

developer_response.body: Thank you for your patience Gibbcart13, we're happy to inform you that the wait is finally over! KARTOFFL - the full game just launched on the Quest Store. Have fun playing :)

reviews.review_description: Was not expecting this to be so challenging but it is. Please respond to this review when you release the full version so I can buy it! Thanks.

developer_response.body: Nikeetz, thank you for the kind words. The full game was just released and is waiting for you now on the Quest Store. We know you like a challenge, so we dare you to try to complete all 60 levels with a 3-star rating :) glhf

reviews.review_title: Oh this will be worth watching
reviews.review_description: This is a fun little game. If you ever played Lemmings and loved it, the full version of this game promises to be great. The demo is incredibly fun.

developer_response.body: So glad you enjoyed the demo, ReverendJesus. The full game is now out on the Quest Store, have fun!

reviews.review_description: Action filled puzzle game that thrilled everyone in our family.
Fun puzzler that should also appeal to kids.
The graphics are great, the character is cute.  This game challenges the brain and keeps me coming back for more.  Looking forward to more levels.  Great job!

developer_response.body: We finally have more levels for you, RoofHopper - you can now get the full Kartoffl game in the Quest Store. Thanks for the kind words, we hope you enjoy the full game as well :)

reviews.review_description:
The game is graphically successful and I was sure to like this lemmings like
But unless I'm mistaken, it's a game where you'll have to play quickly since a small number of blocks are available and you'll have to remove them / put them back in a little panic
If it's really that, it's a big disappointment because no desire to have stressful action in this cute puzzle game
(ps: I stopped around level7 from the demo ; not being able during the pause to see anything -to make a point- was also very frustrating to me)

When is there gonna be a Full Game release to purchase? I’m already hooked on the game and only played a few levels.  
If I have 1 complaint, it’s the controls…. They don’t seem very intuitive. I’m always trying to remember how to rotate a platform is whatever before the little ones fall off the cliff.  Other than that, this game is PERFECT

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback, PowPow55. We're happy to announce that we are now ready to take your money! Not only is KARTOFFL finally released on the Quest Store, but we've also added some extra UI pointers so that it's easier for you to remember how to rotate those platforms :)

Have fun, we're looking forward to seeing how you like the full game!

reviews.review_title: When is the full release happening!?!
reviews.review_description: I love this game! The moment the full game is released, I'm buying it!!! It's so cute!! It makes you think! And the graphics are awesome!!! A truly wonderful game!

developer_response.body:
The moment has come!  We just launched the full game, just look for KARTOFFL on your Quest Store :) 

Thank your kind words on the demo, we hope you enjoy the full game as well - have fun!
